notes: Architecture v2.0 redesign. Key changes: (1) DB is primary state source, features.json is static config; (2) Wave is advisory, not enforced; (3) Agent communication supports fallback channels; (4) Approval supports both granular and blanket modes; (5) GitHub sync is bidirectional.

features.title: Extract shared models.py
features.description: Move Phase, ProjectState, Feature dataclasses from pipeline.py and state_store.py into a dedicated models.py to eliminate circular imports.

acceptance_criteria.description: python -c 'import models; import pipeline; import state_store' succeeds without circular import errors
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'import models; import pipeline; import state_store'

acceptance_criteria.description: All existing tests pass after refactoring
acceptance_criteria.payload: pytest tests/ -v --tb=short

acceptance_criteria.description: No module imports itself directly or indirectly
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, "src"); from models import Phase, ProjectState; print("OK")'

features.title: Add unified configuration management (config.py)
features.description: Create PipelineConfig using pydantic-settings to replace hardcoded constants across all modules. Support environment variable overrides.

acceptance_criteria.description: Config loads from environment variables with PIPELINE_ prefix
acceptance_criteria.payload: PIPELINE_BASE_DIR=/tmp/test python -c 'from config import PipelineConfig; c = PipelineConfig(); print(c.base_dir)'

acceptance_criteria.description: Config validation tests pass
acceptance_criteria.payload: pytest tests/test_config.py -v

acceptance_criteria.description: No hardcoded paths remain in bridge_cli.py or pipeline.py
acceptance_criteria.payload: grep -r 'C:/tmp' src/bridge_cli.py src/pipeline.py || echo 'No hardcoded paths'

features.title: Enhance DB schema v2 and add migration
features.description: Add wave, dependencies, acceptance_criteria, token_cost columns to features table. Create github_sync table. Provide v1-to-v2 migration script.

acceptance_criteria.description: Migration script runs successfully on existing v1 database
acceptance_criteria.payload: python src/migrate_v1_to_v2.py C:/tmp/multi-agent-pipeline/pipeline_state.db

acceptance_criteria.description: DB schema tests verify all new columns exist
acceptance_criteria.payload: pytest tests/test_state_store.py::test_schema_v2 -v

acceptance_criteria.description: features.json can be imported into DB and exported back identically
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'from state_store import StateStore; s = StateStore(); s.import_features("features.json"); s.export_features("/tmp/features_export.json")'

features.title: Implement bidirectional GitHub sync
features.description: Create github_sync.py to synchronize feature status between DB and GitHub Issues. Support issue creation, status updates, and PR linking.

acceptance_criteria.description: GitHub sync creates issues for all pending features
acceptance_criteria.payload: python src/github_sync.py --create-issues --project multi-agent-pipeline

acceptance_criteria.description: Bidirectional sync tests pass with mock GitHub API
acceptance_criteria.payload: pytest tests/test_github_sync.py -v

acceptance_criteria.description: DB github_sync table records all sync operations
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'import sqlite3; c = sqlite3.connect("pipeline_state.db"); print(c.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM github_sync").fetchone()[0])'

features.title: Refactor agent communication with fallback channels
features.description: Update adapters.py to support FileBasedChannel and MCPChannel as fallbacks when delegate_task times out. Implement channel selection strategy.

acceptance_criteria.description: File-based channel dispatches task and collects result
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'from adapters import FileBasedChannel; ch = FileBasedChannel(); ch.dispatch("claude", {"id":"test"}); print(ch.collect("test", timeout=5))'

acceptance_criteria.description: Channel fallback tests verify delegate_task timeout triggers file-based fallback
acceptance_criteria.payload: pytest tests/test_adapters.py::test_channel_fallback -v

acceptance_criteria.description: AgentDispatcher tries all channels before failing
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'from adapters import AgentDispatcher; d = AgentDispatcher(); print(d.channels)'

features.title: Integrate flexible approval system
features.description: Refactor approval.py to support both GranularApproval (L1/L2/L3) and BlanketApproval modes. Integrate into pipeline.py phase transitions.

acceptance_criteria.description: Blanket approval mode allows auto-advance without human intervention
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'from approval import BlanketApproval; a = BlanketApproval("user", {"phases":["design","accept"]}); print(a.is_authorized("design", "F001"))'

acceptance_criteria.description: Approval mode tests pass for both granular and blanket
acceptance_criteria.payload: pytest tests/test_approval.py -v

acceptance_criteria.description: Pipeline respects approval mode configuration
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'from pipeline import Pipeline; p = Pipeline(approval_mode="blanket"); print(p.approval.__class__.__name__)'

features.title: Unify exception hierarchy
features.description: Replace mixed exception handling with unified PipelineException hierarchy. Update all modules to use consistent error types.

acceptance_criteria.description: All custom exceptions inherit from PipelineException
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'from models import PipelineException, ConstraintViolation, PhaseCheckFailed; print(issubclass(ConstraintViolation, PipelineException))'

acceptance_criteria.description: Exception hierarchy tests pass
acceptance_criteria.payload: pytest tests/test_exceptions.py -v

acceptance_criteria.description: No bare except: or generic Exception catching in core modules
acceptance_criteria.payload: grep -r 'except Exception' src/pipeline.py src/phase_checks.py src/phase_flow.py || echo 'Clean'

features.title: Distinguish suggest mode vs auto-advance mode
features.description: Update suggestion_engine.py to properly implement requires_approval flag. Add mode parameter to SuggestionEngine.

acceptance_criteria.description: Suggest mode returns requires_approval=True
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'from suggestion_engine import SuggestionEngine, SuggestionType; e = SuggestionEngine("test"); s = e.suggest_next_phase(None, mode="suggest"); print(s.requires_approval)'

acceptance_criteria.description: Suggestion mode tests verify both suggest and auto modes
acceptance_criteria.payload: pytest tests/test_suggestion_engine.py -v

acceptance_criteria.description: Auto mode does not require approval
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'from suggestion_engine import SuggestionEngine; e = SuggestionEngine("test"); s = e.suggest_next_phase(None, mode="auto"); print(not s.requires_approval)'

features.title: Add comprehensive tests for core modules
features.description: Create tests for pipeline.py, bridge_cli.py, approval.py, and other previously untested core modules.

acceptance_criteria.description: pipeline.py integration tests pass (init, check, advance, rollback)
acceptance_criteria.payload: pytest tests/test_pipeline.py -v

acceptance_criteria.description: bridge_cli.py command tests pass (load, route, suggest, check-hermes)
acceptance_criteria.payload: pytest tests/test_bridge_cli.py -v

acceptance_criteria.description: Coverage for core modules exceeds 80%
acceptance_criteria.payload: pytest --cov=src/pipeline --cov=src/bridge_cli --cov=src/approval --cov-report=term-missing tests/

features.title: Clean up Chinese comments and add English docstrings
features.description: Remove Chinese comments from core modules. Add comprehensive English docstrings. Keep user-facing docs (README, DEPLOY) in Chinese.

acceptance_criteria.description: Core modules have no Chinese characters in comments
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'import re; files=["src/pipeline.py","src/state_store.py","src/system_constraint.py"]; [print(f, len(re.findall(r["[\u4e00-\u9fff]"], open(f).read()))) for f in files]'

acceptance_criteria.description: All public functions have English docstrings
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -m pydoc src.pipeline | head -50

acceptance_criteria.description: User-facing docs (README, DEPLOY) remain in Chinese
acceptance_criteria.payload: Verify README.md and DEPLOY.md are still Chinese

features.title: Implement tool self-hosting
features.description: Use multi-agent-pipeline to manage its own v2.0 development. Create project record, track features through DB, sync with GitHub.

acceptance_criteria.description: pipeline.py init creates project with DB record and features.json import
acceptance_criteria.payload: python src/pipeline.py init multi-agent-pipeline-v2 --base-dir /tmp

acceptance_criteria.description: DB records all v2.0 feature development activities
acceptance_criteria.payload: python -c 'import sqlite3; c = sqlite3.connect("/tmp/multi-agent-pipeline-v2/pipeline_state.db"); print(c.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM features").fetchone()[0])'

acceptance_criteria.description: GitHub Issues created for all v2.0 features
acceptance_criteria.payload: Verify GitHub repo has issues for F001-F011

features.title: Generate final architecture documentation and migration guide
features.description: Create comprehensive docs: architecture.md (this doc), migration_guide.md, changelog.md. Update README and DEPLOY.

acceptance_criteria.description: docs/architecture_v2.md exists and is complete
acceptance_criteria.payload: test -f docs/architecture_v2.md && wc -l docs/architecture_v2.md

acceptance_criteria.description: docs/migration_guide.md exists with step-by-step instructions
acceptance_criteria.payload: test -f docs/migration_guide.md

acceptance_criteria.description: README and DEPLOY updated for v2.0
acceptance_criteria.payload: Verify README mentions v2.0 and new features
